project_type: Python investment analysis multi-agent system with CLI, API, bot integrations, and MCP server
build_system: pip with pyproject.toml, pytest for testing
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, class-based test organization
verification_instructions: Run pytest to confirm all tests pass, check for 0 failures
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' in the project root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode, Python 3.11 via pyenv, all dependencies pre-installed
contribution_requirements: All 18 personas must remain functional, existing tests must pass
key_patterns: Backward-compat shims in scanner/ re-export from src/augur/. YAML safe_load used everywhere. BaseAgent pattern with analyze() method. MarketContext dataclass for input.
directory_structure: src/augur/ = main package, scanner/ = backward-compat shims, skills/ = 18 SKILL.md files, personas/ = markdown persona docs, tests/ = pytest tests, dashboard/ = FastAPI app
